case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. NAI SAETURN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66683327) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SAETURN, NAI DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-13-2021
